title: Ancestral
description: A magic‑tech progression mod where players uncover and harness the forgotten technologies of ancient civilizations.
body:
![Ancestral logo & requires Terrablender](https://i.postimg.cc/9Xt8ZpVM/top-banner.png)
Ancestral is a magic‑tech progression mod where players uncover and harness forgotten technologies from ancient civilizations.


![Features](https://i.postimg.cc/wjShDqpb/Features.png)
New ores and materials: Ancythium, Verdanite, Purified Essence, Infused Crystal.
Ancient machines: Ancestral Purifier, Infuser, and Forge.
Progression tools: Ancestral Pickaxe.
New biome: Ruins Biome with custom trees and ancient structures.
Ancestral Pedestal with item‑based magical effects.
Multi‑step crafting progression using machines and refined components.


![Gameplay Loop](https://i.postimg.cc/L56fmhth/Gameplay-Loop.png)
Explore ruins → gather resources → purify → infuse → forge → unlock ancient abilities.


![Technical](https://i.postimg.cc/6q5RBTry/Technical.png)
Forge mod, English + French, custom worldgen, hardcoded machine recipes.
